text: Quick sync in 5 — nothing major, just circling back on the circle-back.
Loving the energy team! Let's take this offline 🙌
Great question, added it to Thursday's agenda.
Just a heads up, we're going to need everyone to be a bit more scrappy this sprint.
Reminder: mandatory fun is at 4pm today. Attendance is optional but tracked.
I know we said no new initiatives this quarter, but hear me out.

messages.text: Hey team, I was chatting with an investor and he asked if our login page uses blockchain 👀
Interesting. What would blockchain even do for a login page?
Does it matter? He said Web3 like four times and his fund is closing next month.
Say less. Let's get ahead of this. PM, can you scope it?
Scope what exactly, adding blockchain to... authentication?
Just make it decentralized-sounding. Maybe a little globe icon that spins.
Love the globe. Very trustworthy. Ships trust.
To be clear, we currently use email and password. There is no chain to block.
Then we invent one! Innovation is just marketing with extra steps.
PM I'm gonna need this by the investor call Thursday, can we make that happen?
Sounds good, I'll get the team right on it!

Hey team! Just got off a quick sync with a tier-one enterprise prospect. They love the platform, but they just need one tiny feature to sign the contract by Monday morning.
Can we quickly throw together custom multi-tenant SSO, localized PDF invoices for all languages, and a real-time data export? Should only take a couple of hours! ✨🚀
Sure thing, I can handle localization - I've been learning Mandarin Chinese on the Duo Lingo free plan.
And I've heard Mandarin is the hardest, you should be able to pick up all the other ones easy.
Multi-tenant SSO? We're a B2C company, not B2B, what would we need that for?
Oh yeah, I forgot to tell you about the pivot...
Okay, no worries - send me the requirements for the SSO and the data export, I'll have the team get on it.
